title: Socky's Create Modpack
description: A Create centered ish modpack with plenty of vanilla+ content, made to not feel overly modded while providing a modded experience. large focus on optimization and ability to run on lower-end systems.
body:
# Here is my create mod modpack!
i mainly made this for a server with my friends, but i think it is also a good enough modpack to be used on other servers or in singleplayer.
